flow_id: int — row index in test set
predicted_class: string — one of 11 classes: Benign, Bot, DDoS, DoS GoldenEye, DoS Hulk, DoS Slowhttptest, DoS slowloris, FTP-Patator, PortScan, SSH-Patator, Web Attack

top_shap_features.value: float — the actual value of this feature for this flow
top_shap_features.shap_value: float — signed contribution to this prediction; positive = pushed toward predicted_class, negative = pushed away
